name: Macaroons (Low-fat Cooking)
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a sharp knife, cut the almond paste into thin slices. Sprinkle with a small amount of sugar, then chop to a consistency of coarse meal.
2. Beat the almond paste and remaining sugar in a bowl using an electric mixer until combined. Add egg whites and beat until smooth.
3. Sprinkle flour over the batter and continue beating until fully incorporated.
4. Spoon the mixture into a pastry bag fitted with a star tip. Pipe 1-inch circles on baking sheets lined with greased and floured aluminum foil, leaving 2 inches between cookies.
5. Bake at 325°F for about 15 minutes, or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and transfer foil with macaroons to a wire rack. Cool completely before removing cookies from foil.
About 40 macaroons (25% of the original recipe). Each macaroon:
36 calories; 3 mg sodium; 0 cholesterol; 1 gram fat; 6 grams carbohydrates; 1 gram protein; 0.30 gram fiber.
